Name: Kontoor Brands Inc
Description: Kontoor Brands, Inc., a lifestyle apparel company, designs, manufactures, acquires, markets and distributes apparel under the Wrangler and Lee brands in the United States and internationally. The company is headquartered in Greensboro, North Carolina.
Address: 400 NORTH ELM STREET, GREENSBORO, NC, UNITED STATES, 27401
